title: Journal of Machine Learning Research
body: The Journal of Machine Learning Research is a peer-reviewed open access scientific journal covering machine learning. It was established in 2000 and the first editor-in-chief was Leslie Kaelbling. The current editors-in-chief are Francis Bach (Inria) and David Blei (Columbia University).
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in American English
Articles with outdated impact factors from 2018
